themes.headline: Industry SIP at ₹32,087 cr in Mar '26 — all-time high; SIP AUM ~₹15L cr
themes.detail: SIP now accounts for 19.94% of industry MF AUM. Investor base broad-based despite volatility.

themes.headline: UTI Group total AUM ₹23.42L cr; industry AAUM ₹79.46L cr
themes.detail: Retail folios at 27.39 cr industry-wide; UTI's retail AUM proxy at ₹42.89L cr industry.

themes.headline: Headcount cut: 1,402 (Mar '24) → 1,248 (Mar '26)
themes.detail: Supervisor-to-feet-on-street ratio improved from ~1:1 to 1:5. Branch operations rationalised at net-zero incremental cost.

themes.headline: FY26: strong execution across retail flows, distribution, product, and tech

quotes.text: FY25-26 has been a year of resilience in investor behavior, even as markets have witnessed volatility.
quotes.speaker: Vetri Subramaniam, MD & CEO
